description: An item's sales have increased, and a warehouse manager wants to move it to a forward picking location closer to the packing stations to reduce travel time.

nodes.task_description: Run an inventory velocity report to identify the fastest-moving items.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a product that has become a top-10 seller.

nodes.task_description: Find an empty or suitable pick location in the 'Gold Zone' near the outbound area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies an available, appropriately sized location.

nodes.task_description: Create and assign a task for an operator to move the item from its current location to the new, optimized location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a replenishment/move task to the new location.
